=== SAMPLE: STALE World Cup Public Packet (FORECAST HELD) ===

This is the expected public output when:
  lineup_confirmed = true
  model_consumes_lineup = false

The following numbers MUST NOT appear:
  - 1.37 (projected home goals)
  - 1.27 (projected away goals)
  - 2.64 (projected total)
  - 54% (BTTS)

Expected packet structure:

🏟️ Algeria vs Austria
Group: Group J
Venue: Kansas City Stadium
Date: 2026-06-27

🟢 Algeria XI: Oussama Benbot, Riyad Mahrez, Amine Gouiri [+ full XI]
🟢 Austria XI: Alexander Schlager, Marko Arnautovic, Marcel Sabitzer [+ full XI]
📊 Standings: [group_standings_note]
🎯 Context: [advancement_context]

⏸️ FORECAST HELD — Official starting XI confirmed but model composite predates lineup lock.
Projected goals, BTTS, margin, and score distribution from prior composite are suppressed
in public output. Confirmed XIs and match context are shown.
Audit artifact retains prior composite numbers separately.

--- AUDIT ARTIFACT (NOT PUBLIC) ---
_suppressed_forecast:
  prior_composite:
    projected_goals_home: 1.37
    projected_goals_away: 1.27
    projected_total: 2.64
    btts_pct: 54
